Philosophy: Establishes physical, spatial, and travel-based constraints of the sandbox world, ensuring consistent scale, transport limits, and coordinate representation.

CanonicalRules.Text: Ground mounts provide moderate movement speed bonuses exclusively for travel. Mounts never grant combat or progression advantages.
Traversing a continent from edge to edge via standard ground movement should require approximately 45–60 minutes of continuous travel.
Region coordinates define logical placement anchors for streaming, spawning, and teleportation systems and must not be interpreted as literal physical continent boundaries.
Continents are distributed freely across world space without radial or symmetrical constraints. Ice Continent is predominantly northern and Fire Continent predominantly southern.
